# StadiView

> A procedural 3D football stadium seat preview experience. Explore a fully procedural 3D football stadium and preview the match from thousands of individual seats.

## Overview

StadiView is an interactive web application that renders a procedurally generated 3D football stadium using Three.js. Users can explore different sections, tiers, blocks, rows, and seats to preview the view from any seat in the stadium before purchasing tickets.

## Key Features

- Fully procedural 3D stadium generation (no imported 3D models)
- Interactive seat selection with real-time view preview
- Seat information: Section, Tier, Block, Row, Seat number, and Price
- Upcoming match display (Argentina vs Spain)
- Dark-themed neobrutalist design
- Mobile-responsive layout
- Accessibility features: ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, reduced-motion support

## Technology

- Three.js r128 for 3D rendering
- GSAP 3.12.5 for animations
- Vanilla JavaScript (no framework)

## Pages

- `/` - Main stadium experience page

- Domain: https://stadiview.com
